title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAVERONA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAVERONA, MUNICIPALITY OF TALUGTUG, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA TO ALBERTO G. BAUTISTA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 4009; 112 OG No. 16, 2430 (April 18, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10751, March 07, 2016 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAVERONA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAVERONA, MUNICIPALITY OF TALUGTUG, PROVINCE OF NUEVA ECIJA TO ALBERTO G. BAUTISTA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of an Elementary School.

â The name of Saverona Elementary School in Barangay Saverona, Municipality of Talugtug, Province of Nueva Ecija is hereby changed to Alberto G. Bautista Elementary School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Alberto G. Bautista Elementary School shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Saverona, Municipality of Talugtug, Province of Nueva Ecija.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 10, 2014 and December 7, 2015, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved:

MAR 07 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
